head.title: LucidShip – Production-ready SaaS Boilerplate
head.description: LucidShip is a production-ready SaaS boilerplate with auth, payments, i18n, and theming out of the box.

welcome_page.heading: LucidShip — your production-ready SaaS starter.
welcome_page.description: Everything you need to ship your web app faster.

signin.heading: Sign in to LucidShip
signin.subheading: Launch your SaaS faster with production-ready auth, payments, and more
signin.forgot_password_sent: If an account with this email exists, we sent a password reset link
signin.magic_link_sent_description: We sent a link to {email}. Check your inbox and click the link to sign in.
signin.too_many_attempts: Too many attempts. Try again in {minutes} minutes or use "Forgot password?"
signin.session_revoked: Session ended. Please sign in again
signin.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again

recovery.title: Account deactivated
recovery.description: Your account was deleted on {date}. It will be permanently removed in {days} days.

callback.account_deleted_description: Your account is scheduled for deletion. Restore it by clicking the button below.

verify.error_description: The sign-in link you used is no longer valid. Please request a new one.
verify.deleted_description: Your account has been deactivated. You have 30 days to restore it — just sign in during that time.

auth.magic_link_sent: A sign-in link has been sent to your email

auth.unauthorized: Your session has expired. Please sign in again
auth.invalid_magic_link: The link is invalid or has expired

payments.already_subscribed: You already have an active subscription.
payments.subscription_required: An active subscription is required for access.
payments.no_billing_account: No billing account found. Please subscribe first.

generic.rate_limit_exceeded: Too many requests. Please try again in 15 minutes
generic.internal_error: Something went wrong. Please try again later
generic.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again later

security.heading: Security
security.password_changed: Password changed. Other devices have been signed out
security.delete_password_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete your password? You will only be able to sign in with magic link or Google.

danger_zone.heading: Danger zone
danger_zone.delete_description: After deletion you have 30 days to restore your account.

delete_account_modal.title: Delete account
delete_account_modal.description: Are you sure? Your account will be deactivated. You will have 30 days to restore it.
delete_account_modal.magic_link_sent: Confirmation link sent to your email
delete_account_modal.rate_limit: Too many requests. Please try again in 15 minutes
delete_account_modal.magic_link_sent_description: A confirmation link to delete your account has been sent to your address. The link is valid for 15 minutes.

subscribe.title: Subscribe
subscribe.description: Unlock all premium features and take your product further.

active.title: Your subscription
active.cancel_notice: Your subscription will be canceled at the end of the current period.

callback.refresh_error: Failed to update data. Please reload the page.

credits.title: Credits
credits.description: Purchase credits to use services. Each action uses 1 credit.
credits.error: Failed to create payment session. Please try again.
